sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix the gpu cored-dump.
Root cause: During CUDA graph capture, the captured data was fed with
a KV sequence length smaller than the query (Q) length, which caused
an illegal memory access and triggered a GPU core dump.

sglang.author: mmangkad

Summary
Transformers v5 depends on a newer huggingface_hub which switched from requests to httpx as its HTTP backend. httpx logs every HTTP request at INFO level, flooding server output since SGLang sets the root logger to INFO.

sglang.title: Fix token leak with logprob_start_len=0 in streaming sessions
sglang.author: YazhiGao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When logprob_start_len=0 is used with streaming sessions, init_next_round_input truncates the prefix match key to length 0. For streaming sessions, SessionAwareCache.match_prefix then computes prefix_len = min(kv_committed_len, 0) = 0, bypassing the session slot's committed KV and orphani

sglang.title: Simplify streaming session logprob handling
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Streaming sessions don't support custom logprob_start_len — the committed KV can't be re-forwarded for logprob computation. Previously this was handled by a workaround in SessionAwareCache.match_prefix that used fill_ids length to bypass the truncated prefix key and then clamped logprob_sta

Changed fallback from '' to '0' so it's a valid boolean value

sglang.title: [JIT Kernel] Fix NVFP4 multi-arch compilation failure
sglang.author: mmangkad
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Remove unnecessary extra 10.3a arch append in _get_nvfp4_cuda_arch_list(). Before #20103 this was harmless (just wasted compilation for an unused arch on CUDA 13+), but now that load_jit() injects a single SGL_CUDA_ARCH, compiling for multiple archs triggers a static_assert mismatch.
cc @Dar

sglang.title: perf: avoid unnecessary gpu-cpu sync in eagle_info
sglang.author: ehuaa
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When stress testing Qwen3.5-397B with MTP enabled, the scheduler occasionally encounters the following scheduler watchdog error. Preliminary analysis suggests a potential deadlock arising from the interaction between GPU-CPU synchronization and collective communications (e.g., AllReduce).

sglang.title: perf(kimi_linear): replace einops rearrange with native torch ops in Kimi-Linear KDA path
sglang.author: vedantjh2
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
einops.rearrange adds Python-level overhead (pattern parsing, backend dispatch, shape validation) on every call. In the Kimi-Linear-48B model's KimiDeltaAttention hot path, this is called thousands of times per forward pass.
This PR replaces all 8 einops.rearrange calls with equivalent na

sglang.title: perf(mamba): use Triton conv1d for non-contiguous input to avoid .contiguous() copy
sglang.author: jasperjiaguo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
causal_conv1d_fn in sgl_kernel requires the input tensor to have stride(-1) == 1 (contiguous last dimension). When called during prefill, the input x is a transposed view of the GEMM output:
mixed_qkv = mixed_qkv.transpose(0, 1)          # [seq, dim] → [dim, seq], non-contiguous
mixed_qkv =

vllm.author: yassha
vllm.bodyExcerpt:

Add null check after std::aligned_alloc in ScratchPadManager::realloc to handle allocation failures correctly. When allocation fails, a clear error is raised instead of leaving ptr_ null while size_ is updated, which can lead to null pointer dereferences when the scratchpad is used.

The tool_call_id_type detection only checked fo

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Mxfp8OnlineLinearMethod is incompatible with DeepGEMM. However, because it inherits from Fp8LinearMethod, it gets picked up by the isinstance check in _fp8_linear_may_use_deep_gemm and crashes with AttributeError on machines with deep_gemm installed.
This PR explicitly skips DeepGEMM for Mxf

vllm.title: Fix `SpeculatorsConfig` now that `PreTrainedConfig` is a `dataclass` in Transformers
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Since Transformers converted PretrainedConfig to a dataclass, users will see unexpected keyword argument errors on SpeculatorsConfig.__init__.
This PR adds a passthrough so that SpeculatorsConfig.__init__ can accept kwargs and passes them directly to PretrainedConfig.__init__ which also accepts kwar

vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add retry logic (default 3 attempts) with 4x timeout backoff to get_bytes, async_get_bytes, download_file, and async_download_file in connections.py
Only retry on transient errors (timeouts, connection failures, 5xx server errors like S3 503 SlowDown) -- 4xx client errors raise immediately

vllm.title: [Performance] Enable Triton autotuning disk cache by default
vllm.author: arpera
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Triton's @triton.autotune decorator re-runs kernel autotuning on every process restart because TRITON_CACHE_AUTOTUNING defaults to disabled. For vLLM serving workloads this adds significant latency to the first inference request after each server start.
Set TRITON_CACHE_AUTOTUNING=1 via os.e

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Deepseekv32 tool parser when stream interval > 1
vllm.author: sfeng33
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The deepseek 3.2 tool parser used an incremental state machine (~20 instance variables) that parsed DSML tags character-by-character as tokens streamed in. With stream_interval > 1, multiple parameters or closing tags can arrive in a single delta, causing the state machine to skip parameters

vllm.author: divakar-amd

vllm.title: Fix DP coordinator ZMQ port TOCTOU
vllm.author: itayalroy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously the parent selected the DP coordinator's TCP ZMQ ports with
get_open_port() before the coordinator actually bound them, leaving a
window where another socket could claim the ports.
Fix this by letting the coordinator bind first and report the bound ZMQ
addresses back to the parent via pip
